User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the EchoLive application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

registrationDate.description: The date and time the user registered.

levelId.description: Reference to the Level entity. (Relationship: Level 1:N User)

isAdmin.description: Denormalized flag for UI purposes indicating admin privileges. Security is enforced by the '/admins' collection.

isOwner.description: Denormalized flag for UI purposes indicating app owner privileges. Security is enforced by the '/appowners' collection.

isAgent.description: Denormalized flag indicating if a user has agent privileges. Security for changing this field is enforced by security rules.

hasTreasuryAccess.description: Denormalized flag for UI purposes indicating treasury access privileges. Security is enforced by the '/treasury_access' collection.

photoWall.description: An array of data URIs for the user's photo wall images.

coverImageUrl.description: URL of the user's profile cover image.

coverImageOffsetY.description: The vertical offset (in percentage) for the cover image, from 0 to 100.

selfIntroduction.description: A short bio or self-introduction from the user.

followingCount.description: The number of users this user is following.

followerCount.description: The number of users following this user.

visitorCount.description: The number of users who have visited this user's profile.

securityPasswordSet.description: Indicates if the user has set a security password.

paymentMethods.description: A map of payment method names to wallet addresses.

livestreamPoints.description: Total points earned from livestreaming activities.

partyPoints.description: Total points earned from participating in party rooms.

transferPoints.description: Total points received via transfers from other users.

platformRewardPoints.description: Total points earned from platform rewards and missions.

agentRequestStatus.description: The status of a user's request to become an agent.

agentRequestDate.description: The date and time the user requested to become an agent.

Level.title: Level
Level.description: Represents a level in the leveling system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Level entity.

levelType.description: The type of level (Livestream Level or Wealth Level).

requiredPoints.description: The number of points required to reach this level.

PartyRoom.title: PartyRoom
PartyRoom.description: Represents a party room in the EchoLive application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PartyRoom entity.

title.description: The title of the party room.

roomType.description: The type of party room (e.g., 4-seat, 9-seat, Silver VIP).

capacity.description: The maximum number of users that can occupy the party room.

isLive.description: Indicates whether the party room is currently live.

userIds.description: References to Users currently in the party room. (Relationship: User N:N PartyRoom)

seats.description: A map of seat numbers to user IDs.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a transaction in the EchoLive application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Transaction entity.

transactionType.description: The type of transaction (e.g., purchase, withdrawal, exchange).

amount.description: The amount of coins or points involved in the transaction.

timestamp.description: The date and time of the transaction.

details.description: Additional details about the transaction (e.g., item purchased, recipient).

price.description: The price in USD for purchase transactions.

Gift.title: Gift
Gift.description: Represents a gift in the EchoLive application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Gift entity.

coinCost.description: The cost of the gift in coins.

Guardian.title: Guardian
Guardian.description: Represents a Guardian tier in the EchoLive application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Guardian entity.

tierName.description: The name of the Guardian tier (e.g., Guardian of Silver).

price.description: The price of the Guardian tier (subscription or one-time purchase).

badgeUrl.description: URL of the Guardian badge image.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserGuardian entity.

startDate.description: The start date of the subscription.

endDate.description: The end date of the subscription.

PKBattle.title: PKBattle
PKBattle.description: Represents a PK battle between two users.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PKBattle entity.

challengerId.description: Reference to User who initiated the battle. (Relationship: User 1:N PKBattle (as challenger))

opponentId.description: Reference to User who was challenged. (Relationship: User 1:N PKBattle (as opponent))

winnerId.description: Reference to User who won the battle. (Relationship: User 1:N PKBattle (as winner))

battleDate.description: The date and time of the battle.

Withdrawal.title: Withdrawal
Withdrawal.description: Represents a withdrawal request from a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Withdrawal entity.

amount.description: The amount of points to be withdrawn.

status.description: The status of the withdrawal request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected, completed, payout_failed).

withdrawalDate.description: The date and time of the withdrawal request.

paymentMethod.description: The payment method used for the withdrawal (e.g., Bitcoin, Binance).

paymentAddress.description: The payment address for the withdrawal.

payoutTransactionId.description: The transaction ID from the payment provider after a successful payout.

payoutError.description: The error message from the payment provider if the payout failed.

Violation.title: Violation
Violation.description: Represents a record of a user violating a platform rule.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Violation entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who committed the violation.

ruleTitle.description: The title of the rule that was violated.

violationDate.description: The date and time the violation was recorded.

reportingAdminId.description: The user ID of the admin who recorded the violation.

notes.description: Additional notes or details about the violation.

Stream.title: Stream
Stream.description: Represents a live stream in the application.

GlobalBalance.title: GlobalBalance
GlobalBalance.description: Stores global financial data for the application, like total revenue and fees.

id.description: Should be a singleton identifier, e.g., 'singleton'.

totalUsdRevenue.description: Total revenue in USD generated from all sources, including coin purchases and fees.

updatedAt.description: The last time the balance was updated.

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.description: Represents an admin user record for security purposes.

id.description: The user ID of the admin.

grantedAt.description: The date and time the admin role was granted.

AppOwner.title: AppOwner
AppOwner.description: Represents the application owner for special permissions.

id.description: The user ID of the app owner.

assignedAt.description: The date and time the owner role was assigned.

TreasuryAccess.title: TreasuryAccess
TreasuryAccess.description: Represents a user with access to the application's treasury functions, including viewing and withdrawing global revenue.

id.description: The user ID of the treasury member.

grantedAt.description: The date and time treasury access was granted.

definition.description: Stores user profiles. A user can read/write their own profile. Admins can read/write any profile.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores live stream data. Publicly readable, admin-only write access.

params.name: streamId
params.description: The unique identifier for the stream.

params.name: levelId
params.description: The unique identifier for the level.

definition.description: Stores party room data. Includes denormalized 'userIds' array for authorization independence. Any member of this list can read the document. The list is directly updated by trusted functions only.

params.name: partyRoomId
params.description: The unique identifier for the party room.

definition.description: Stores a global list of all transactions for admin querying and auditing. Admin-only read access.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the transaction.

definition.description: Stores transaction history for each user. Access control is path-based: only the user or an admin can read their own transactions.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the transaction.

params.name: giftId
params.description: The unique identifier for the gift.

definition.description: Stores guardian tier definitions. Publicly readable.

params.name: guardianId
params.description: The unique identifier for the guardian tier.

definition.description: Stores user's guardian subscriptions. Access control is path-based: only the user or an admin can read/write their own subscriptions.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: userGuardianId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user guardian subscription.

definition.description: Stores PK battle records.  Anyone can read.  Write is restricted to server-side functions or admins.

params.name: pkBattleId
params.description: The unique identifier for the PK battle.

definition.description: Stores withdrawal requests. Users can create, admins can manage.

params.name: withdrawalId
params.description: The unique identifier for the withdrawal.

definition.description: Stores withdrawal requests for each user. Only the user and admins can access this data. The withdrawals collection stores all withdrawals to allow filtering and ordering, while the user scoped collection allows quick access to the withdrawals for a specific user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: withdrawalId
params.description: The unique identifier for the withdrawal.

definition.description: Stores records of rule violations. Admin-only access.

params.name: violationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the violation.

definition.description: Stores the application's global financial data, such as total revenue and fees. This collection should be admin-only.

params.name: balanceId
params.description: A singleton identifier for the global balance document (e.g., 'singleton').

definition.description: Stores a list of admin user IDs. This collection is the source of truth for admin role checks in security rules.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID of the admin.

definition.description: Stores the app owner's user ID. This collection should be a singleton and is the source of truth for app owner checks.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID of the app owner.

definition.description: Stores a list of user IDs with treasury access. This collection is the source of truth for treasury role checks.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user ID with treasury access.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to support EchoLive's features, emphasizing security, scalability, and ease of management. Authorization Independence is achieved through denormalization, particularly in Party Rooms, where relevant user information is embedded to avoid complex `get()` calls in security rules. Structural Segregation is used by dedicating collections to specific data types with uniform security needs.

The structure ensures the integrity of relationships through path-based ownership, especially for User-owned data. This approach simplifies security rules and maintains data consistency.

To ensure QAPs (Rules are not Filters), party rooms are segregated. Global roles are implemented via a dedicated '/admins' collection to avoid recursive 'get()' calls in security rules. User data is primarily secured through path-based access control, with collaborative features handled through denormalized data within party rooms. A new admin-only `global_balances` collection has been added to securely track application-wide financial data.
